skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: A participant in a long-distance race completes the race with an average speed of 22,000 yards per hour. What is this average speed, in miles per hour? (1 mile = 1,760 yards)
rationale: Average speed in miles per hour = 22,000 ÷ 1,760 = 12.5 miles per hour.
